project.name: Netbeans Plugin Kotlin Compiler CLI Base
project.description:
Bundles all classes from kotlin-compiler:2.3.21 that are absent from both the -for-ide thin artifacts and the 242-era Maven platform JARs. Uses set-difference at build time:
keep := NOT in (kotlin-compiler-common-for-ide ∪ kotlin-compiler-ir-for-ide) AND NOT in (core:242 ∪ core-impl:242 ∪ util:242 ∪ extensions:242)
This captures cli/jvm/compiler/**, com/intellij/** (Java-plugin classes absent from published 242 platform), and third-party shaded deps (aalto, stax2, etc.) that were bundled inside the old kotlin-compiler fat JAR but are absent from the thin -for-ide artifacts.
